name: Caelia
text: Selkie! Zenith says you keep plotting Moon's course with your own hands.

name: Selkie
text: I am trying to reach her, not steer her.

name: Caelia
text: Excellent answer. Rescuers often say it just before grabbing the helm.

name: Selkie
text: Then watch me leave it in her hands.

name: Caelia
text: Crescent Gate opens for travelers who can lose the future they imagined.

name: Selkie
text: Test me. I will choose Moon, not choose for her.
